description: Zhipu AI GLM-OCR (0.9B) Cloud API communication protocol and local inference JSON contract.

content.text: Please perform OCR on this document image. Return a JSON object with the following fields: full_text (string), bounding_boxes (array of {text, x, y, w, h, confidence}), structured_fields (object with any detected key-value pairs such as date, invoice_number, total_amount, vendor_name, stamp_detected).

error_codes.429: Rate limit exceeded — apply exponential backoff

local_inference.description: Local vLLM or ONNX server inference endpoint. Assumes an OpenAI-compatible HTTP server running locally.
local_inference.request_schema: Same as cloud_api.request_schema but with model set to local model_id

image_preprocessing.note: Use Pillow to resize and convert TIFF/BMP before base64 encoding. JPEG at 85 quality balances OCR accuracy vs. API payload size.

pdf_text_overlay.coordinate_conversion: Multiply normalized (x,y,w,h) by actual image (width, height) to get pixel coords. PyMuPDF uses points (1 pt = 1/72 inch). Convert: pt = px * 72 / dpi.
pdf_text_overlay.invisible_text_flags: fitz.TEXT_FONTSIZE set to bbox height in pts; render_mode=3 (invisible) via PDFpage.insert_textbox.
